text:
What is an agent?
An agent is an LLM with agency: it reasons, invokes TOOLS to interact with the world, RETRIEVES from memory, and loops until the TASK is complete.
ocr_reason: Short definition slide with large, readable text; OCR is unnecessary for this pass.
